tracks.meaning: the continuous smooth motion of a liquid, gas, or other substance in a particular direction
to move steadily and continuously in one direction
the movement of blood, sap, or other bodily fluids through vessels or tissues
the transmission of data, electricity, or signals through a system or network
the movement or circulation of money through an economy or financial system
a continuous production process or the rate at which work progresses through stages
a state of deep focus and effortless concentration during an activity
the movement of substances through a medium or the rate of a chemical reaction
the movement of air currents or wind patterns
the natural movement or arrangement of hair on the body
to proceed without difficulty or to progress naturally and easily
the smooth progression of conversation or narrative without interruption
